disclaimer: Personal signal tracker. Counts from WHO DON and news reports - verify at primary sources before citing.

regions.name: Ushuaia, Argentina
regions.notes: Ship departure April 1. Index case likely exposed here during birdwatching. Rodent trapping underway. 101 hantavirus cases in Argentina since June 2025 - double prior year.

regions.name: Saint Helena
regions.notes: Case 1 died April 11. ~40 passengers disembarked April 24 - all contact traced.

regions.name: Ascension Island
regions.notes: British passenger (case 3) evacuated April 27, flown to Johannesburg ICU. WHO confirmed.

regions.name: Cape Verde (MV Hondius)
regions.notes: Ship anchored off Praia May 3-7. German woman (case 4) died May 2. Now heading to Tenerife, arriving May 9.

regions.name: Johannesburg, South Africa
regions.notes: Case 2 died April 26 PCR confirmed. Case 3 in ICU improving. Contact tracing for April 25 flight passengers initiated.

regions.name: Netherlands
regions.notes: Cases 5 and 6 airlifted from Cape Verde May 5 - WHO confirmed. KLM flight attendant (case 9) admitted Amsterdam UMC May 7 - suspected, tests pending.

regions.name: Zurich, Switzerland
regions.notes: Case 7. Male passenger confirmed Andes strain at University Hospital Zurich.

regions.name: France
regions.notes: RUMOR PING: Case 8. French national monitoring only - shared Airlink flight with case 2. Unconfirmed.

regions.name: Singapore
regions.notes: RUMOR PING: Cases 10-11. Two residents (67, 65) isolated in govt facility. On April 25 Johannesburg flight with confirmed case. Tests pending.

regions.name: Arizona, USA
regions.notes: RUMOR PING: 1 returning MV Hondius passenger under CDC monitoring. Currently healthy.

regions.name: Georgia, USA
regions.notes: RUMOR PING: Georgia DPH confirmed 2 residents monitoring after disembarking MV Hondius. Both healthy, no infection signs.

regions.name: California, USA
regions.notes: RUMOR PING: California DPH monitoring returning MV Hondius travelers. No illness reported.

regions.name: Tenerife, Spain
regions.notes: Ship arriving Granadilla port May 9. Spain reversed ban after WHO pressure. 146 passengers from 23 nationalities to disembark.

regions.name: United Kingdom
regions.notes: WHO notified by UK IHR focal point May 2. Saint Helena is British territory - contact tracing for ~40 disembarked passengers underway.

regions.name: Uruguay
regions.notes: RUMOR PING: Dutch index case crossed into Uruguay March 13, returned March 27. Route under investigation for exposure source.

regions.name: Chile
regions.notes: RUMOR PING: Dutch index case crossed Chile border multiple times Nov 2025-Apr 2026. Neuquen and Misiones WHO-designated endemic zones visited.
